snapshot_metadata.captured_by: task CICD-070 (pre-cutover snapshot per spec FR-A06)

api_response.message: Branch protection has been disabled on this repository.

interpretation: Pre-cutover state on master is 'no protection enabled'. This is the authoritative rollback target per spec §152: in the event of a rollback during the 24-48h post-cutover window, restoring branch protection means restoring it to 'disabled' (the current state), NOT restoring the older Jun-1 baseline. The Jun-1 baseline (projects/github-actions-rationalization-r1/baseline/branch-protection-2026-06-01.json) documents the INTENDED protected configuration that task 071 cutover sets, but that's a forward-looking target, not the rollback target.
rollback_command: If rollback is needed within 24-48h post-cutover (per spec §152 triggers: Tier 1 flake >2% sustained 24h; master green rate <90% over 24h; >3 false-positive blocks within 24h; merge queue stalls >2h with >4 PRs), execute: gh api -X DELETE repos/spaarke-dev/spaarke/branches/master/protection (no-op if already disabled). This restores the pre-cutover state.
forward_target_for_cutover: Task 071 will enable protection with required_status_checks=["CI / Router"], enforce_admins=true, strict=true, allow_force_pushes=false, allow_deletions=false. This is a CHANGE from the pre-cutover state.
